text: In this week's International Educational Blog, we focus on the role of agents and recruiters who have become ubiquitous representatives on the ground of many universities trying to recruit international students. In this post, we highlight the complaints that agents and recruiters have caused for universities and students, and reflect on how best interests of all can be served.
explanation: The passage uses generic, broadly plausible phrasing with no distinctive style, making it hard to distinguish from AI-generated text; there are no clear indicators of human-only nuance.
